positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with appropriate welcome or user identity indicators
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is displayed in the UI
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful, confirming that email field is case-insensitive and user is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' in the username/email field (uppercase version of valid email)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing uppercase characters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and the user remains authenticated on the dashboard without being forced to log in again
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify dashboard content is still visible and accessible
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and session persistence after page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password visibility toggle works correctly, and user is successfully logged in after toggling and submitting valid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the password is masked (shown as dots or asterisks) by default
Click the 'Show Password' or eye icon toggle button if available
Verify the password is now visible in plain text
Click the toggle again to mask the password
Verify the password is masked again
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with password visibility toggle

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, redirected to the login page, and session is fully invalidated preventing access to protected pages
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard
Locate and click the 'Logout' or 'Sign Out' option (in the navigation menu or user profile)
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify that navigating to the dashboard URL directly redirects back to the login page (session is invalidated)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout and redirect to login page

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login page loads completely with all expected UI elements rendered correctly, no broken elements or console errors
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the page title or heading is displayed correctly
Verify the username/email input field is present and visible
Verify the password input field is present and visible
Verify the 'Login' or 'Submit' button is present and enabled
Verify any 'Forgot Password' or 'Sign Up' links are present if applicable
Verify there are no console errors in the browser developer tools
positive_scenarios.title: Login page renders correctly on load

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is prevented and validation error messages are displayed for both empty username and empty password fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field completely empty
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify that the form is not submitted
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g., 'Username is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails, user remains on the login page, and a generic error message is displayed without revealing which field is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials', 'Incorrect username or password')
Verify the password field is cleared or remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is prevented and an email format validation error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalidemail' (without @ and domain) in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email address')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is prevented and a validation error message is displayed indicating the password field is required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the password field (e.g., 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails, user remains on the login page, and a generic error message is displayed without confirming whether the email is registered
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistentuser_xyz_99999@fakeemail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'AnyPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'User not found')
Verify the error message does NOT confirm whether the email exists (to prevent user enumeration)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with non-existent user email

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails securely, no unauthorized access is granted, and the application handles the malicious input gracefully without exposing internal errors
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the username/email field
Enter 'AnyPassword' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the application does not grant unauthorized access
Verify an appropriate error message is shown or the input is sanitized
Verify the application does not crash or expose database errors
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails gracefully, an appropriate validation or error message is shown, and the application does not crash or expose server errors
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter a password string of 300+ characters (e.g., 'A' repeated 300 times) in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the application handles the input gracefully
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed or the input is truncated
Verify the application does not crash or return a server error (500)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with password exceeding maximum character limit

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Whitespace-only inputs are treated as invalid or empty, form submission is blocked or fails, and appropriate error messages are displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter '     ' (spaces only) in the username/email field
Enter '     ' (spaces only) in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the form treats whitespace-only input as empty or invalid
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed
Verify the user is NOT logged in
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with only whitespace in username and password fields
